idea-plugin.name: Waveform Plotter
idea-plugin.description:
Real-time waveform plotter for embedded debugging in CLion. Key Features:
  • Passive Mode — Automatically captures Watch variables on breakpoint/step pause events
  • Live Watch — Non-invasive real-time memory monitoring via OpenOCD Telnet (CPU keeps running)
  • FFT Spectrum Analysis — One-click time/frequency domain switching with Hanning window and dB magnitude spectrum
  • ELF Symbol Resolution — Zero-pause variable address resolution from ELF symbol table
  • Multi-channel — Up to 8 channels with pan, zoom, crosshair tooltip, and CSV export
Designed for OpenOCD / DAP-Link / ST-Link users. CLion's native Live Watches only supports J-Link/ST-Link — this plugin fills the gap for CMSIS-DAP debuggers.
idea-plugin.change-notes:
v1.3.1
  • Real-time X-axis — True time-based X-axis replacing sample index, oscilloscope-style negative time (latest = 0)
  • Auto-adaptive time units — ms/μs toggle button, friendly 1-2-5 grid intervals like professional oscilloscopes
  • Smart auto-tracking — Auto-fit all data by default, sliding window after zoom, mouse-anchored zoom
  • Larger buffer — Data buffer increased to 10000 samples (200s at 50Hz)
v1.3.0
  • High-Speed Sampling (HSS) — Byte-level bulk I/O replaces character-by-character reading, zero-allocation prompt scanning, sampling rate up to 2000 Hz
  • Pre-compiled parsing — OpenOCD response regex compiled once, reused across all samples
  • Reusable read buffer — Pre-allocated 4KB byte buffer eliminates GC pressure in sampling hot path
v1.2.0
  • FFT Spectrum Analysis — Time/FFT one-click toggle, Cooley-Tukey radix-2 FFT with Hanning window, dB magnitude spectrum display
  • Performance — FFT result caching (recompute only on data change), Hanning window precomputation, work array reuse, BasicStroke caching
  • DataBuffer versioning — Atomic version counter for efficient cache invalidation
v1.1.0
  • Live Watch via OpenOCD Telnet with ELF symbol resolution
  • Editor right-click "Add to Waveform Plotter" action
  • Telnet pipelining + TCP_NODELAY for precision sampling

action.description: Add selected variable to Waveform Plotter
